svg.text: Most prop firms ban options · but you can trade the 0DTE flow in ES & MES futures

g.text: → Charm-driven 3pm ramp: long MES at 14:30 ET with 8-point stop, ride to gamma wall
→ Pin fade: short MES if SPX 3+ pts above gamma wall at 14:30, target wall ± 1pt
→ Lunch chop fade: 11:30-13:00 in ES, fade extremes back to morning IB midpoint
→ Open volatility short: if VIX +5%, short ES after 10:30 capitulation candle
All four setups have 60-65% win rate on Apex / Bulenox / TPT eval rules
Stops fit in drawdown · profit target hit in 5-10 sessions average
Prop firms that allow related strategies
Apex Trader Funding · 100% accept gamma-driven futures setups · 90% profit split
Bulenox · same · trailing EOD drawdown forgiving for early entries
TakeProfit Trader · no news restrictions on most sizes · ideal for FOMC fades
